articles.title: Kylian Mbappe Misses Penalty As Yassine Bounou Equals World Cup Record In France vs Morocco Quarter
articles.excerpt: France were awarded a penalty after Noussair Mazraoui had brought down Kylian Mbappe inside the box, but the French captain failed to convert from the spot in the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final against Morocco.
articles.summary: France were awarded a penalty after Noussair Mazraoui had brought down Kylian Mbappe inside the box, but the French captain failed to convert from the spot in the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final against Morocco.

articles.title: France vs Morocco Highlights: Mbappe, Dembele Fire Les Bleus Into World Cup 2026 Semi
articles.excerpt: France became the first team to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals after beating Morocco 2-0 in Boston, with Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele scoring for Les Bleus.
articles.summary: France became the first team to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals after beating Morocco 2-0 in Boston, with Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembele scoring for Les Bleus.

articles.title: Kylian Mbappe Reclaims Golden Boot Lead With Stunning Goal Against Morocco In World Cup 2026 Quarter
articles.excerpt: After seeing an early penalty saved by Yassine Bounou, Kylian Mbappe bounced back with a stunning strike to move ahead of Lionel Messi as the leading scorer at the FIFA World Cup 2026.
articles.summary: After seeing an early penalty saved by Yassine Bounou, Kylian Mbappe bounced back with a stunning strike to move ahead of Lionel Messi as the leading scorer at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer's India Suffer Longest-Ever T20I Winless Streak After Nine
